tools.name: organizations.orgpolicyOrganizationsCustomConstraintsCreate
tools.description: Creates a custom constraint. Returns a `google.rpc.Status` with `google.rpc.Code.NOT_FOUND` if the organization does not exist. Returns a `google.rpc.Status` with `google.rpc.Code.ALREADY_EXISTS` if the constraint already exists on the given organization.

tools.name: organizations.orgpolicyOrganizationsCustomConstraintsList
tools.description: Retrieves all of the custom constraints that exist on a particular organization resource.

tools.name: projects.orgpolicyProjectsConstraintsList
tools.description: Lists constraints that could be applied on the specified resource.

tools.name: projects.orgpolicyProjectsPoliciesCreate
tools.description: Creates a policy. Returns a `google.rpc.Status` with `google.rpc.Code.NOT_FOUND` if the constraint does not exist. Returns a `google.rpc.Status` with `google.rpc.Code.ALREADY_EXISTS` if the policy already exists on the given Google Cloud resource.

tools.name: projects.orgpolicyProjectsPoliciesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a policy. Returns a `google.rpc.Status` with `google.rpc.Code.NOT_FOUND` if the constraint or organization policy does not exist.

tools.name: projects.orgpolicyProjectsPoliciesGet
tools.description: Gets a policy on a resource. If no policy is set on the resource, `NOT_FOUND` is returned. The `etag` value can be used with `UpdatePolicy()` to update a policy during read-modify-write.

tools.name: projects.orgpolicyProjectsPoliciesGetEffectivePolicy
tools.description: Gets the effective policy on a resource. This is the result of merging policies in the resource hierarchy and evaluating conditions. The returned policy will not have an `etag` or `condition` set because it is an evaluated policy across multiple resources. Subtrees of Resource Manager resource hierarchy with 'under:' prefix will not be expanded.

tools.name: projects.orgpolicyProjectsPoliciesList
tools.description: Retrieves all of the policies that exist on a particular resource.

tools.name: projects.orgpolicyProjectsPoliciesPatch
tools.description: Updates a policy. Returns a `google.rpc.Status` with `google.rpc.Code.NOT_FOUND` if the constraint or the policy do not exist. Returns a `google.rpc.Status` with `google.rpc.Code.ABORTED` if the etag supplied in the request does not match the persisted etag of the policy Note: the supplied policy will perform a full overwrite of all fields.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
